title: pimpinella × supersaxifraga
intro: Pimpinella × supersaxifraga, also known as the hybrid burnet or burnet saxifrage, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Pimpinella × supersaxifraga include its potential to reduce inflammation, protect against oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to treat various ailments, such as digestive issues and skin conditions.
